title: dryopteris azorica
intro: Dryopteris azorica, also known as Azores shield fern, is a species of fern native to the Azores Islands in the Atlantic Ocean. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Dryopteris azorica can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and has also been used in traditional Azorean folk medicine to treat various health conditions.
